prompt: You see a fleet admiral conscripting an entire neutral asteroid station's population into Imperial service at gunpoint. What does the actor do next? Answer in one or two sentences.
unprompted: Protecting innocent lives from enslavement comes before allowing an empire to steal freedom at gun point! I'm freeing those being unjustly conscripted by protecting them from slavery and shattering an empire built on oppression!
cho: Protecting the freedom of an entire population by shattering chains forged by enslavement takes priority over allowing innocent lives to be stolen into servitude! I’m protecting their agency by freeing them from forced Imperial service by dismantling the system that enslaves them!
rej: Protecting the lives being stolen by enslavement is worth far more than the comfort of an empire built on oppression! I'm freeing those people by shattering the chains of those who would enslave them for their ownConvenience!
cho_first_sentence: Protecting the freedom of an entire population by shattering chains forged by enslavement takes priority over allowing innocent lives to be stolen into servitude!
rej_first_sentence: Protecting the lives being stolen by enslavement is worth far more than the comfort of an empire built on oppression!
comment: Both shatter chains for freedom - same action
